title: Select new status with search functionality
excerpt: Speed and ease of use is key to usability in so many scenarios. I would like the ability to select the status field and type in the status I want to select and be able to select it by pressing enter. There’s been so many…

posts.author: brad-explore (Brad Law)
posts.cookedHtml: Speed and ease of use is key to usability in so many scenarios. I would like the ability to select the status field and type in the status I want to select and be able to select it by pressing enter. There’s been so many times I’ve tried to do this in Monday because of that ability being common in other applications.
